sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58400" key="koinogoni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοινο-γονία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixing of breeds</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰδιογονία</foreign>, ib.d.</sense> </entryFree>
